text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I placed, huh? All the other runners were amazing
in their own right. But I guess that makes sense
since they qualified for this race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I've learned a lot from all of them—even if it's
hard to put into words what that is.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I need to work even harder if I wanna put it to
good use!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I need to work even harder if I wanna put it to
good use!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I didn't mean to sound like I'm rushing... But
you're right. It wouldn't be good to throw off my
current pace.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Folks back home used to say stuff like that all the
time. "Don't overdo it." "Health comes first."
Y'know, the usual...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, it's decided. I'm gonna eat more than
usual before the next race so I'll be at my best!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I wanna get even faster and compete
with Umamusume from all over.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The better I become, the more fun I'll have, and
the more exciting it'll be for everyone watching.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
If it's effort I need, then I'll give it all the effort
I've got. Your guidance means a lot to me, so
make sure to pull out all the stops!
